description_long: This is a decorative mailbox mounted on a single wooden post with a square base for stability. The mailbox body is rectangular and features a sloped, green-tiled roof reminiscent of traditional Asian architecture. The front face has a mail slot and a subtle handle, while the sides display wooden framing and white paneling. The rear side appears to have a larger access panel for mail retrieval. The mailbox stands at a practical height for pedestrian access and is designed to be both functional and visually appealing in an urban or suburban setting.
description: A decorative, rectangular mailbox with a green-tiled roof, mounted on a single wooden post and featuring a front mail slot and rear access panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mail slot and handle beneath the green-tiled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof and wooden framing with white paneling.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a larger access panel for mail retrieval.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the side panel and roof design.
